channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Alabama makes March Madness record 25 3s and romps past BYU 113-88 to reach Elite Eight
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Alabama broke the 35-year-old March Madness record for 3-pointers with 25 and Mark Sears scored 30 of his 34 points on 3s, a relentless long-range spree that ushered the second-seeded Crimson Tide past BYU 113-88 on Thursday night in an NCAA Tournament East Region semifinal.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Led by Mark Sears, Alabama breaks record for 3-pointers in a March Madness game with 25
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Led by Mark Sears, Alabama broke the 35-year-old record for 3-pointers in an NCAA Tournament game Thursday night, making 25 in a 113-88 victory over BYU in an East Region semifinal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Abreu dedicates 2-homer game for Red Sox to newborn twins after one for late grandmother last year
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Wilyer Abreu dedicated this two-homer game to his newborn twin boys. Abreu went deep twice in Boston's season-opening 5-2 win at Texas, including a tiebreaking three-run shot in the ninth inning Thursday.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers celebrate 2024 World Series victory with Ice Cube and Kirk Gibson at home opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It’s a new season but the Los Angeles Dodgers are still celebrating their 2024 World Series championship. Rapper Ice Cube rolled up to their dugout in a vintage blue convertible with the Commissioner’s Trophy in the front passenger seat.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Novak Djokovic beats Sebastian Korda, advances to semifinals in push for 7th Miami Open title
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Novak Djokovic is finding a higher gear in South Florida after a sluggish start to 2025.
item.dc:creator: MARC BERMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Wells becomes 1st catcher to hit leadoff homer on opening day and Yankees beat Brewers 4-2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Austin Wells became the first catcher to hit a leadoff homer on opening day, Anthony Volpe also went deep and the New York Yankees began their AL pennant defense by beating the Milwaukee Brewers 4-2 on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU expects shootout against Alabama in Sweet 16
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - The last time BYU was in the Sweet 16 was 2011 with Jimmer Fredette. For the local BYU players who grew up in Utah, they remember it well.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: This California MLB team has highest median ticket price, new report finds
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls stay hot, down Nuggets to win 3rd straight and 8th of last 10
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Suddenly, the Chicago Bulls are one of the hottest teams in the NBA, and they kept things rolling late Monday night in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's playoff hopes take big hit with 5-1 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The playoff hopes of the Utah Hockey Club are growing dimmer after a 5-1 loss to the Detroit Red Wings Monday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stephen Curry listed as questionable for Golden State's Tuesday game in Miami
item.description: Stephen Curry is back with the Golden State Warriors after missing the first game of the team's road trip with a pelvic contusion, and could play when his team takes on the Miami Heat in Jimmy Butler's return game Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC dealt first loss in inaugural season
item.description: San Diego FC lost its first game of the season thus far on Sunday when the club fell 2-1 to Austin FC at Q2 Stadium in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: In March Madness, BYU gets a stop, then gets to go ... to Sweet 16 with 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: The BYU Cougars led the entire game Saturday but still had to make one, final defensive stop against Wisconsin's irrepressible guard, John Tonje, to seal a 91-89 victory over the Badgers and the program's first trip to the Sweet 16 since 2011 — the days of Jimmer Fredette.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 seed Houston holds off Gonzaga comeback, beats No. 8 seed Bulldogs 81-76 to reach Sweet 16
item.description: LJ Cryer matched a career high with 30 points, including two free throws with 14.2 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston held on to beat eighth-seeded Gonzaga 81-76 on Saturday night to reach the Sweet 16 for the sixth straight NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump makes NCAA men's wrestling championships his latest sports-focused trip
item.description: BRIDGEWATER, N.J. (AP) — President Donald Trump attended the NCAA wrestling championships on Saturday night for the second time in three years, the latest example of how he has mostly limited travel early in his new term to trips built around sports events.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Red Rocks win Big 12 Championship
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 regular season and Championship titles during its debut season in the Conference after the Red Rocks tallied a score of 197.775 at the 2025 Big 12 Gymnastics Championship held at the Maverik Center in West Valley City, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: McNeese's Will Wade signs a 6-year deal to become NC State coach, AP source says
item.description: McNeese coach Will Wade has a signed six-year deal to take over as N.C. State's next coach, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks face Blues in St. Louis
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (20-40-9, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (35-28-7, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 3 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The St. Louis Blues host the Chicago Blackhawks with a four winning streak intact. St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Major League Baseball removes references to 'diversity' from MLB Careers home page
item.description: Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred, who launched a Diversity Pipeline Program in 2016, said following an owners meeting in Palm Beach, Florida, last month that MLB was evaluating the interpretation of law coming from the federal government.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes season ends with 76-68 loss to Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's basketball team's fourth consecutive trip to the NCAA Tournament was a short one. Yarden Garzon scored 17 points and Shay Ciezki added 16 as No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How to watch Illinois' first-round NCAA March Madness matchup
item.description: Set for their fifth consecutive March Madness appearance, Illinois looks to build upon an up-and-down season as they open their 2025 NCAA Tournament run with one of the final first-round matchups.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Guenther scores go-ahead goal in 3-2 win over Buffalo
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club scored three goals in the third period and defeated the Buffalo Sabres 5-2 at Delta Center on Thursday. Mikhail Sergachev scored twice for Utah (31-27-11), which has won five of its last seven games at home.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies go ice cold in Big Dance loss to UCLA
item.description: LEXINGTON, Kent. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State couldn't have picked a worse time to have the worst offensive game of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
